positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a celestial forest at twilight. Focus on strong, contrasting silhouettes of ancient, gnarled trees with delicate, glowing luminous flora. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring deep indigo and sapphire blue color gradients against touches of ethereal gold and soft mint green light emanating from the forest floor. The style should be highly detailed digital painting mixed with negative space aesthetics, designed to be printed cleanly on a light-colored fabric. Emphasize clean edges and a dramatic, mysterious mood.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, noisy, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, grain, jpeg artifacts
